Class KnownCustomer

java.lang.Object
RestaurantGame.KnownCustomer
All Implemented Interfaces:
Customer
Direct Known Subclasses:
David, John, Mariah, Peter, Sarah
public abstract class KnownCustomer extends Object implements Customer
An abstract base class for special customers who have known to the restaurant, predefined attributes such as name, shape, color, personality, and a favorite order.

  • Constructor Details

    • KnownCustomer

      public KnownCustomer(String name, String shape, javafx.scene.paint.Color color, ArrayList<Toppings> favoriteOrder, KnownCustomer.Personality personality, int patienceLevel)
      Creates a KnownCustomer with explicit attributes.
      Parameters:
      name - : The customer's name
      shape - : The shape of the customer
      color - : The customer's display color
      favoriteOrder - : The customer's favorite toppings list
      personality - : he customer's personality behavior type
      patienceLevel - : How long the customer will wait before leaving
